Breaking news : Murderous rampage in scotland over stuffed cat, 15 killed.
Breaking news : unanimous agreement for tree tax leads to uproar in Amazon!
Breaking news : Who even reads these... seriously!
Breaking news : Guns will now use phosphorous instead of gunpowder, activist states.
Breaking news : White chalk deemed "racist", by population.
Breaking news : "Doing work is overated and unhealthy", claims lazy scientist.
Breaking news : AI creates an hour of music, "It was terrible, as expected".
